name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service offering domestic and international fund transfers through a network of retail agent locations including Walmart and Ace Cash Express.
description_long:
MoneyGram is a global money transfer service that enables consumers to send and receive money domestically and internationally. The company operates through a network of retail agents rather than standalone branches, partnering with major retailers like Walmart and check-cashing services like Ace Cash Express to provide convenient access points. This agent-based model allows MoneyGram to maintain a widespread physical presence across the United States, including 28 documented locations in Tucson, Arizona alone.

MoneyGram's core service offerings include money transfer capabilities that customers can manage both online and offline. The service allows consumers to send funds to recipients and receive money transfers at physical locations. By leveraging existing retail infrastructure, MoneyGram integrates money transfer services into established convenience points where consumers already conduct financial transactions, such as Walmart stores and specialized check-cashing outlets.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its extensive retail partnership network, which provides significant location density and accessibility. Rather than requiring customers to visit dedicated transfer offices, MoneyGram embeds its services within locations customers already frequent for shopping and financial services. The availability of extended hours through partner locations (many Ace Cash Express locations open until 8:00-8:30 PM, Walmart locations until 9:00-11:59 PM) accommodates various consumer schedules.

MoneyGram is primarily a money transfer intermediary, not a traditional financial institution offering accounts, credit products, or lending services. Success with the platform depends on identifying partner locations in your area and understanding their individual hours of operation. While the network coverage is extensive in urban areas like Tucson, rural users may face more limited accessibility. The service's value is directly tied to the reliability and convenience of its retail partners.
pros: Extensive network of 28+ locations in Tucson across popular retailers (Walmart, Ace Cash Express)
Extended hours available through retail partners, with some locations open until 11:59 PM
Ability to manage transfers both online and offline for flexible access
Integration with major national retailers (Walmart) providing convenient one-stop shopping
Multiple Ace Cash Express locations provide geographic distribution across different Tucson neighborhoods
Partnership with established financial service providers (Ace Cash Express) adds credibility
No requirement to open an account to conduct individual transfers
cons: Dependent on third-party retail partners' hours and operational decisions, with no direct company control
Retail agent locations may discontinue MoneyGram services without notice, reducing accessibility
Service fees not disclosed on website, requiring customers to inquire at partner locations
Limited to locations where retail partners operate; rural or underserved areas may have no access
No dedicated customer service location; complaints must be handled through retail partners
best_for: Urban and suburban residents needing convenient money transfer access through existing shopping locations
Consumers sending funds to family or recipients without bank accounts domestically
Individuals preferring in-person transactions over digital-only money transfer services
People with irregular schedules who need access to extended-hours financial services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers in urban areas with reliable access to Walmart or Ace Cash Express locations who need convenient, in-person money transfer services. The primary caveat is that service quality and availability depend entirely on retail partner cooperation, meaning locations and hours can change unpredictably, and fees are determined individually by agents rather than transparently disclosed by MoneyGram.
services: Domestic money transfers (send and receive within the US)
International money transfers to recipients outside the United States
In-person transfer services at retail locations
Money receipt services at partner locations
Transfer funds via retail agents (Walmart locations)
Transfer funds via check-cashing partners (Ace Cash Express)
Location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
